name: Hydra's Breath
description:
Passive: Miasma

Attacks poison enemies, dealing %poison_damage_per_second%%% of the target's Max HP as Magical Damage per second for %poison_duration% seconds.

Passive: Polycephaly

Ranged attacks have a %proc_chance%%% chance to fire additional projectiles at up to %count% nearby enemies with %secondary_target_range_bonus% extra range and within a %secondary_target_angle% degree angle in front of the attacker. The additional projectiles deal %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct%%% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects except for Miasma. The primary attack deals %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct_primary_tooltip%%% damage of a normal attack.
notes: Attack Range bonuses from Monkey King Bar and Dragon Lance and its upgrades do not stack.
